insights.proximity: This address has 2 confirmed health concerns and 1 warning. A gas station is within 120 ft and Route 21 carries heavy traffic just 85 ft away.
insights.your_neighborhood: Most everyday amenities will likely require driving from this location.

summary_narrative: 456 Industrial Ave has health and safety concerns that need attention. A gas station sits within 120 ft and Route 21 carries 78,000 vehicles daily just 85 ft from the address. An underground storage tank is also in the vicinity.
